matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The Brazilian Forest Service LPF page explicitly names the record Pouteria egregia and captions this file Corte tangencial. The direct filename uses the documented combination Sandwithiodoxa egregia.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at original resolution. A clean reddish longitudinal wood face fills the frame; fine grain is visible and there are no living plant parts, external log/bark, finished object, diagram, or microscopy.
matchedCandidate.creator: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro, Laboratório de Produtos Florestais (LPF/SFB)
